title: cassinia storyi
intro: Cassinia storyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Australia. It has been traditionally used by the Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Cassinia storyi can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in different ways.
